title_lines: GILGIT-BALTISTAN ELECTION 2026 — REVISION 3.0 PREDICTION SUMMARY (29 May 2026)
REVISED MODEL: PPP resurgence in Baltistan and Nagar; PML-N gains from IPP collapse; PTI base fragmented by symbol ban.
Election Date: 7 June 2026 (GBA-24 polling separately scheduled per ECGB notification).

party_projection.driver: Resurgence in Baltistan and Nagar, deep organizational strength, Bilawal-Aseefa roadshow impact, consolidation of Shia votes.
Gains from IPP collapse; strongholds in Diamer, parts of Astore, and Ghanche; federal alignment in Sunni-majority seats.
Persecution narrative mobilising base. Symbol ban hurts but core vote intact in Nagar-II, Skardu-II, Ghizer-II.
Wazir Saleem personal vote and religious network in GBA-9 Skardu-III.
GBA-23 Ghanche-II multi-cornered fragmentation; Amina Ansari personal vote.
Collapse due to 'turncoat' narrative. CM Gulbar Khan loses GBA-18.

critical_flips.reason: Aftab Haider's 18-month ground campaign + Bilawal roadshow outpaces Sohail Abbas's fading PTI-symbol vote.
Without the PTI bat symbol, Nagar-I reverts to its pre-2020 PPP-leaning mean. Muhammad Ali Akhter's family legacy + Shia base.
Col (R) Imtiaz ul Haq's military background + progressive Hunza appeal lift PPP back into the seat.
Imran Nadeem's UC network + TLP vote collapse + PPP youth energy outweigh Shigri's traditional biraderi.
CM Gulbar Khan loses. Anti-IPP sentiment + Malik Kifayat's biraderi + CM fatigue flip the seat.
Mushtaq Hussain's IPP label toxic. 'Doctor vs. turncoat' narrative helps Dr Ashiq Hussain.

government_formation_scenarios.label: PPP-Led Coalition (65 percent)
government_formation_scenarios.description: PPP (11) + PML-N (8) = 19 seats. PPP becomes the senior partner; coalition continues but the leadership balance flips from the 2020-2026 era. Possible PPP Chief Minister.

government_formation_scenarios.label: PPP-PTI Alternative (25 percent)
government_formation_scenarios.description: PPP (11) + PTI-backed (3) + Independent (1) + JUI-F (1) = 16 seats. PPP-led coalition without PML-N. Possible if federal balance shifts and PTI proxies cooperate.

government_formation_scenarios.label: Hung Assembly (10 percent)
government_formation_scenarios.description: No clear majority. Heavy post-election horse-trading expected. Reserved-seat allocation becomes decisive.

gba24_delay_note: GBA-24 (Ghanche-III) polling note: ECGB scheduling subject to revision.
